query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "adaplanbench: evaluating adaptive planning in large language model age" linguistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it provides empirical evidence on the core mechanism of "instruction adherence" (a proxy for planning and following complex linguistic constraints) across a broad domain of LLMs, which is the fundamental variable under investigation in the user's question about evaluating adaptive planning.
